function.message: I couldn’t complete this inbox request because one required source file is missing: `50_finance/purchases/_2026_03_06__eur_000022__bill__house_mesh_esp32_topup.md`. I confirmed the path is not present (read failed) and a follow-up search found no matches. I made no record edits, so there are no partial migrations.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied inbox and migration rules requiring full completion without partial edits: 99_system/workflows/inbox-processing-v2-update.md and 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly listed 5 files. Four were readable, but the fifth exact path was missing and not discoverable via search. Completing only 4/5 would violate the no-partial-completion requirement when a task is not fully doable.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of 5th requested file (not found)
